race.comment: The maiden stayers kick us off. PARADISE AS USUAL (7) found the line nicely to grab third last time out over 1690m at Ipswich. Rock-hard fit for this and is expected to be in the finish again. SHARK PARK (10) held on well to finish second last time out over 1900m at Gold Coast Poly after leading for much of the way. Solid run last time and will take plenty of catching again. SHE CAN SOAR (11) finished fifth at her most recent outing over 1690m at Ipswich. Cannot be ruled out in this suitable assignment. IT'S OK (9) was responsible for a better run last start, beaten 1.2 lengths into fourth over 1605m at Tuncurry. Suitably placed and looks a must for the exotics players.
